narrative:
Colerain Twp township has 1,249 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
